title: BEM-866 classify stderr result
objective:
Run script:
"""
result = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
processed = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
data = {}
if result.exists():
    data = json.loads(result.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
stderr = str(data.get('stderr') or '')
stdout = str(data.get('stdout') or '')
status_value = str(data.get('status') or '')
text = (stderr + '\n' + stdout + '\n' + status_value).lower()
response_text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in [line.strip() for line in response_text.splitlines()]
if ok:
    code = 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK'
elif not result.exists():
    code = 'RESULT_MISSING'
elif status_value == 'DISPATCHED':
    code = 'DISPATCHED_WAITING_CLAUDE_WRITE'
elif 'could not resolve to a workflow' in text or 'not found' in text or '404' in text:
    code = 'WORKFLOW_NOT_FOUND'
elif 'does not have workflow_dispatch' in text:
    code = 'NO_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH'
elif 'http 422' in text or 'unprocessable entity' in text:
    code = 'UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY'
elif 'unknown flag' in text or 'accepts' in text or 'invalid input' in text or 'unexpected' in text:
    code = 'INVALID_INPUTS'
elif 'permission' in text or '403' in text or 'resource not accessible' in text:
    code = 'PERMISSION_DENIED'
elif 'not logged into' in text or 'authentication' in text:
    code = 'AUTH_FAILED'
elif 'gh: command not found' in text:
    code = 'GH_MISSING'
elif status_value == 'DISPATCH_FAILED':
    code = 'DISPATCH_FAILED_WITH_STDERR'
else:
    code = 'UNKNOWN'
slug_source = (stderr or stdout or status_value or 'empty')[:120]
slug = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in slug_source)[:80]
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_STDERR_RESULT_' + code + '_' + slug + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 stderr result\nCode: ' + code + '\nStatus value: ' + status_value + '\nQueue exists: ' + str(queue.exists()) + '\nProcessed exists: ' + str(processed.exists()) + '\nClaude write OK: ' + str(ok) + '\n\nSTDERR:\n' + stderr[:3000] + '\n\nSTDOUT:\n' + stdout[:2000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('stderr result classification: ' + code)
"""
No issue comments.
